bash.prompt: run npm commands (install, build, test, preview, lint)
run git commands (status, add, commit, push, pull, branch, checkout, log, diff, remote)
check directory structure and file listings
read and view files (cat, head, tail, etc.)

VITE_RAPIDAPI_KEY.description: Yahoo Finance RapidAPI key for stock price fetches. Get from https://rapidapi.com/apidojo/api/yahoo-finance-api3

preCommit.description: Run ESLint before commit to catch style issues
